subject: Re: LSJ Lady G boat
body:
fine.. Did you meant the testes?

----- Original Message ----
From: "Miles Alexander, LSJ" <littlestjames@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffery E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>; Emad Hanna <ehanna@nysgmail.com>; Rich Kahn <rkahn@nysgmail.com>; Daphne Wallace <daphnelwallace@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, February 19, 2007 11:03:03 AM
Subject: LSJ Lady G boat

Greetings
   
  The port engine oil has turned white and there is more smoke than usual which means that there is a water leak into the engine oil. I have elected to not use the boat to prevent any damage to the engine. In order to move staff around I have set up a water taxi shuttle for the remainder of the week. I have also left messages with the Yamaha dealer in ST Thomas so that they can test and diagnose as soon as possible. The problem could be a simple gasket failure to a warped head. The testes will tell.
   
  The water taxi will supply me with costs on Tuesday as today is a public holiday and nobody can provide numbers.
   
  Trust that this is in order
   
  Miles


    Mr Miles Alexander 
  Little St James Island, 6100 Red Hook Qrts B3, St Thomas, USVI, USA. 00802-1348
  Phone : 340-5139855, Fax : 340-7758108,
 Email : littlestjames@yahoo.com
   








 
____________________________________________________________________________________
